rationale: The citing paper references Sethuraman, Tellis, and Briesch (2011) only when interpreting its own estimated advertising elasticity magnitudes, noting they are in line with that meta-analysis. The citation functions as an external benchmark check for reasonableness of results. The paper does not build its theory, identification strategy, or estimation approach on this source, nor does it engage with its moderators or findings in a way that shapes the core model.
